issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases such as network failures, Docker not installed, or port conflicts.

scenarios.name: deploy-nodejs-api-with-captain-definition
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies every rubric requirement, while Response B omits key elements such as the captain-definition file, docker run install command, and serversetup step.

scenarios.name: automate-app-creation-with-caprover-api
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric with a caproverApi function and all required operations, while Response B omits the required caproverApi function and uses a different approach.
